nasb.text: They were saying to one another, “Who will roll away the stone for us from the entrance of the tomb?”

esv.text: And they were saying to one another, “Who will roll away the stone for us from the entrance of the tomb?”

cnv.text: 彼此說：“誰可以給我們輥開墓門的石頭呢？”

ccb.text: 途中她们彼此议论说：“谁能替我们滚开墓口那块大石头呢？”

csbs.text: 她们互相说：“谁能替我们滚开墓穴口的石头呢？”
